title: X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:X-wingStrategyGuide.jpg]] |title=''X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM:
The Official Strategy Guide'' |author=*[[Rusel DeMaria]] *[[David Wessman]] *[[David Maxwell]] |cover artist=*[[Anne Flemke]] {{C|Cover Production Coordinator}} *[[Dunlavey Studio]] {{C|Adaptation to Cover}} |illustrator=*Rusel DeMaria {{C|Book Design, Layouts}} *[[Marian Hartsough Associates]] {{C|Layouts}} *[[Shawn Morningstar]] {{C|Layouts}} |editor=*[[Paula Munier Lee]] {{C|Managing Editor}} *[[Hartley Lesser]] {{C|Senior Acquisitions Editor}} *[[Kip Ward]] {{C|Project Editor}} *[[Becky Whitney]] {{C|Copyeditor}} *[[Rick Barba]] {{C|Copyeditor}} |publisher=*[[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] *[[Roger Stewart]] |release date=[[March 22]], [[1995]]{{WebCite|url=https://publicrecords.copyright.gov/detailed-record/voyager_15113070|text=X-wing collector's CD-ROM :the official strategy guide /Rusel DeMaria, David Wessman, David Maxwell.|work=the [[Wikipedia:United States Copyright Office|U.S. Copyright Office Public Records System]]|archivedate=20251009145745}} |type=Paperback |pages=580 |dimensions=7.5 × 1.2 × 9.5 inches |weight=2.2 pounds |isbn=1559587857 |series=''Prima's Secrets of the Games'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide''''' was a computer game strategy book for [[Star Wars: X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: X-Wing: Collector's CD-ROM'']], the CD-ROM version of [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], written by [[Rusel DeMaria]], [[David Wessman]], and [[David Maxwell]] and published by [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]]. A [[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide|previous edition]] of the guide was published along with the game's original release. Like the first edition, it contained much of the story from ''[[The Farlander Papers]]'' and continued the story of [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] throughout. It also included walk-throughs and strategies designed to help players defeat the simulator missions and the missions for the game's first three Tours of Duty, and interviews with the game's creators and design team. Additional material in this version included walkthroughs for the [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit|''Imperial Pursuit'']] and [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing|''B-wing'']] expansion packs. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Keyan Farlander, one of the greatest Rebel heroes, is back. Once again, he has emerged victorious from a series of daring conflicts with the evil Empire, and in your hands is the book that chronicles his strategic and tactical genius. Rest assured, there's no better guidance in the universe for winning every perilous ''X-wing'' scenario. Inside, you'll discover:'' ''*Critical information for pushing each type of spacecraft to its limits'' ''*Winning paths through a galaxy of ''X-wing'' battles, including:'' ''**Every original ''X-wing'' mission'' ''**''Imperial Pursuit'''' ''**''B-wing'''' ''**All new missions created specifically for the CD-ROM version'' ''**Add-on missions'' ''*Revealing interviews with Larry Holland, Ed Kilham, and the ''X-wing'' Design Team'' ''*More of the ''Farlander Papers'' - Rusel DeMaria's limited edition, collector's novella that was included in many of the original X-wing game boxes'' ''*Detailed statistics for every mission'' ==Contents== *Part I: Farlander's Story *Part II: Early Training *Part III: Historical Combat Missions **X-wing Historical Combat Missions **Y-wing Historical Combat Missions **A-wing Historical Combat Missions *Part IV: Tours of Duty **Tour of Duty #1 — A New Ally **Tour of Duty #2 — The Great Search **Tour of Duty #3 — The Gathering Storm *Part V: X-wing CD Missions **Tour of Duty #4 — Imperial Pursuit **Tour of Duty #5 - B-Wing **X-Wing CD Bonus & Historical Missions *Appendices **Most Commonly Asked Questions About X-wing **Glossary **Index ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|1559587857}}; [[March 22]] [[1995]]; [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]]; US paperback{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/154|text=X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide}} ===Cover gallery=== File:X-wingStrategyGuide.jpg|Front cover File:X-wingStrategyGuide-CD-back_cover.jpg|Back cover ==Appearances== {{App |characters=
